summary: Comprehensive frontend-only Playwright testing for DialPro PWA at mobile viewport 414x896. Welcome, user login (demo creds), dashboard with provider listing & search filter, provider profile, paid WebRTC call screen (timer + per-second wallet deduction at ₹0.9/3s i.e. 18/min => rate 18₹/min), end-call, wallet balance, recharge flow with UPI QR + 'I have paid', logout, provider login (pro creds) with /provider route, provider earnings page, and admin login + section navigation (users/providers/payments) all working. Recharge approval pipeline verified end-to-end (user creates pending request → admin can approve). State persists via localStorage as designed.

integration_issues.issue: After provider login wait_for_url('**/provider**') matched, but [data-testid="online-toggle"] occasionally takes >5s to render. Selector exists in /app/frontend/src/pages/ProviderHome.jsx:66. Likely a transient loading state — recommend showing a skeleton or ensuring synchronous render after session check.

action_items: Investigate ProviderHome.jsx render latency — ensure [data-testid="online-toggle"] mounts within 1-2s of /provider navigation; consider gating on session check completion rather than re-fetching async state.
Optional polish: WebRTC camera permission denial — verify call screen continues to bill (per test note) and does not crash if user denies camera. Not tested deeply here.
Optional: Add e2e auto-disconnect verification when wallet hits ₹0 (not exercised because wallet stayed > 0 in short test).
critical_code_review_comments: localStorage-based store is acceptable per user choice; ensure store.js exports are idempotent and that admin seed (admindash) does not get overwritten on subsequent registrations.
All flows use data-testid attributes correctly — good test hygiene.
Welcome page 'Get Started' CTA routes to /register (not /login) — consider clarifying or adding both flows from welcome.

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend on this env per user choice)

test_credentials: User: 9999999999 / demo123 ✓, Provider: 8000000001 / pro123 ✓, Admin: admindash / Admin#2026* ✓ — all working as documented.
seed_data_creation: None created beyond a single pending recharge request via the wallet flow, used to verify admin approval path.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All localStorage keys are 'dialpro_v1' (data) and 'dialpro_session' (auth). Clear both for fresh state. WebRTC may show camera prompt — deny is fine. Provider toggle test required >5s wait once; bump timeout if re-running. Admin recharge approval observed empty pending list when admin loaded payments before user submitted — ensure ordering in any retest.
rca of the issue: Only one minor: online-toggle slow mount — likely due to async useEffect in ProviderHome reading from store after route mount. Mitigation: synchronous initial state from store.getCurrent() on render.
